---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new check, command, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What's missing from the current tool?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature. Be specific about what it would check, how it would work, and what the output looks like.

## Category

- [ ] New SEO check
- [ ] New accessibility check
- [ ] New design evaluation check
- [ ] CLI improvement
- [ ] Report improvement
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered other approaches? Why is this the right one?
